options.name: -abutment
options.description: Specifies the distance that pins on the same track and layer must have from one another so as to be considered as abutted.

options.name: -abutmentFile
options.description: Reports, in the file specified, the list of pins that are considered as abutted.

options.name: -checkOnly
options.description: Specifies that only a report of the messages should be displayed but no changes should be made to the netlist.

options.name: -ecoFile
options.description: Specifies the name of the ECO file that will contain a report of the changes.

options.name: -excludeInst
options.description: Prevents feedthrough buffers from being added for the specified instance.

options.name: -excludeNet
options.description: Prevents feedthrough buffers from being added to the specified net.

options.name: -floatingPortList
options.description: Specifies that the list of unused ports should be saved in the specified file.

options.name: -maxSearchDistance
options.description: Specifies the distance in microns from the wire crossing till which the command should search to find a connected feedthrough.

options.name: -portMap
options.description: Specifies the name of the file that contains the feedthrough connectivity definitions.

options.name: -searchAllSides
options.description: Specifies that if the closest available feedthrough pin on the same side cannot be connected,command should search other sides as well.

options.name: -selectInst
options.description: Specifies that feedthrough buffers should be added only for the specified instances.

options.name: -selectMarkedNet
options.description: Specifies that feedthrough buffers should be added only to the nets that are currently selected.

options.name: -selectNet
options.description: Specifies that feedthrough buffers should be added only to the specified nets.

options.name: -verbose
options.description: Provides additional messages, for example net-specific messages.
